hero.heading: The IT partner regulated firms trust
hero.lead: IronGate Managed IT was founded on a simple idea: that healthcare, legal, and financial firms deserve enterprise-grade security and support without an enterprise-sized IT department. We've spent over a decade making that real.

story.heading: Built by people who've been in the hot seat
story.para1: Our founders spent years running IT inside clinics and firms where a single outage or breach could mean lost patients, blown deadlines, or regulatory penalties. They knew the typical break-fix vendor wasn't good enough.
story.para2: So they built IronGate around prevention, compliance, and genuine partnership — a team you can call by name that treats your risk as its own. Today we protect organizations across the region, and we've never lost a client to a preventable breach.

valuesHead.heading: Principles that show up in every ticket

values.title: Security first, always
values.body: Every recommendation we make starts with the question: does this reduce your risk? Convenience never trumps protection.

values.title: Plain-English partnership
values.body: No jargon, no condescension. We translate technology into decisions you can actually make with confidence.

values.title: Accountable & responsive
values.body: One team, one number, real people who know your environment — and answer in minutes, not days.
